emails.subject: Request for Project Timeline Confirmation
emails.body:
Hello Alex,

I hope you’re doing well.

I wanted to follow up regarding the project timeline we discussed last week. Could you please confirm whether the proposed milestones are still achievable on your end?

This will help us finalize our internal planning and communicate accurate dates to stakeholders.

Thanks in advance, and looking forward to your feedback.

Best regards,
Jordan

emails.subject: Re: Request for Project Timeline Confirmation
emails.body:
Hi Jordan,

Thanks for reaching out.

Overall, the timeline looks reasonable. However, we may need an additional few days for the second milestone due to some resource constraints this month.

I’ll review the full plan again today and get back to you with a more precise update.

Best,
Alex

emails.subject: Re: Request for Project Timeline Confirmation
emails.body:
Hi Alex,

Thanks for the quick response.

An extension on the second milestone could work, as long as it doesn’t impact the final delivery date. Please let me know how many extra days you anticipate needing so we can assess the downstream impact.

Appreciate you taking another look.

Best,
Jordan

emails.subject: Re: Request for Project Timeline Confirmation
emails.body:
Hi Jordan,

I’ve reviewed the schedule in more detail.

We would need a 3-day extension on the second milestone. The good news is that we can recover this time during the testing phase, so the final delivery date should remain unchanged.

Let me know if that works for you.

Best regards,
Alex

emails.subject: Re: Request for Project Timeline Confirmation
emails.body:
Hi Alex,

That sounds reasonable.

If the final delivery date is unaffected, we’re comfortable with a 3-day extension on the second milestone. Please proceed with the updated plan and share the revised timeline when ready.

Thanks for the clarification.

Best,
Jordan

emails.subject: Re: Request for Project Timeline Confirmation
emails.body:
Hi Jordan,

Perfect, thanks for the confirmation.

I’ll update the project timeline accordingly and send you the revised version by end of day. We’ll proceed based on the adjusted milestones.

Looking forward to continuing the collaboration.

Best regards,
Alex
